case_title: LVNV FUNDING LLC VS. AMIE VALLE ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING NOV-20-2018 AT 10:30 AM. THIS DISMISSAL IS PURSUANT TO PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT VALLE, AMIE AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1 TO 10, INCLSUIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-09-2018
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100030364), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC SERVED OCT-18-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT VALLE, AMIE AN INDIVIDUAL
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, E-FILING REJECT, (TRANSACTION ID # 100032666) SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT VALLE, AMIE AN INDIVIDUAL
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-20-2018 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR NOV-20-2018 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-20-2018 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES:
Colby Dean Lavelle, Esq. specially appearing for the plaintiff. At the request of plaintiff's counsel, the Court ordered the case dismissed with prejudice. Judge: TERI L. JACKSON; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.
